channel.title: FierceBiotech — Health, Longevity & Diet
channel.description: FierceBiotech articles filtered for longevity, health, diet, and healthspan research

item.title: 'We need to put some bad ideas to bed': Inside Incubate's battles for biotech on Capitol Hill
item.description: John Stanford spent a busy day on Capitol Hill this week making the case that the success of the domestic biotech industry is an issue of national security, health care access and economic competitiveness.

item.title: Pulmatrix picked for reverse merger with anti-aging biotech weeks after Cullgen deal collapses
item.description: Pulmatrix may have been discarded by Cullgen, but the inhaled therapy biotech’s Nasdaq listing has caught the attention of another company.

item.title: Wave crashes after obesity trial tracks 1% dip in body weight over 6 months
item.description: Wave Life Sciences linked its obesity drug candidate to a 1% dip in body weight after six months, leading investors to drive the stock down by more than 50% despite the biotech hailing the data as positive.

item.title: Endogenex nets $50M to carry intestinal diabetes procedure to the FDA
item.description: The fundraising comes after clinical results showed its system met safety goals and led to metabolic improvements in HbA1c, fasting glucose levels and body weight.

item.title: Novo Nordisk prepares to go global as triple-G prospect passes midphase diabetes test in China
item.description: Novo Nordisk and its Chinese partner have reported another midphase win for their triple G candidate, sharing diabetes data to add to the momentum generated by an obesity readout. But while the data suggest the asset is competitive, Eli Lilly’s headstart in the space means it remains the company to beat.

item.title: BrightGene's oral dual agonist sees up to 8% weight loss at 8 weeks in slice of early data
item.description: China’s BrightGene has served up a slice of early-stage data to remind everyone that it has a horse in the oral obesity race.
